title: bupleurum falcatum var. elongatum
intro: Bupleurum falcatum var. elongatum, also known as Chinese kuzu or Chinese hare's ear, is a variety of Bupleurum falcatum, a plant species in the Apiaceae family, native to East Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Bupleurum falcatum var. elongatum include reducing fever, relieving respiratory and digestive issues, and supporting liver and kidney function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
